Roblox.Catalog.Api.AssetFavoriteModel.description: A model to represent asset favorites.

assetId.description: The Id of the asset being favorited.

created.description: The time at which the user favorited the asset.

userId.description: The Id of the user favoriting the asset.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.BundleDetailsModel.description:
The hydration model representing a bundle on marketplace. Returned in all bundles controller endpoints.
Bound in the game-engine MarketplaceService.GetProductInfo method.
https://create.roblox.com/docs/reference/engine/classes/MarketplaceService#GetProductInfo.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.BundleFavoriteModel.description: A model to represent bundle favorites.

bundleId.description: The Id of the bundle being favorited.

created.description: The time at which the user favorited the bundle.

userId.description: The Id of the user favoriting the bundle.

assetType.description: The asset type of the bundle item, if it's an asset.

supportsHeadShapes.description: Whether the bundle item supports head shapes.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.BundleItemDetailModel.description: The is the beta (non game-engine) version of BundleItemDetailModel for internal consumption on Roblox web and universal-app.

assetType.description: The asset type of the bundle item, if it's an asset.

supportsHeadShapes.description: Whether the bundle item supports head shapes.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.CatalogSearchDetailed.description:
Game-engine version of fully hydrated asset or bundle in catalog marketplace.
Documented here: https://create.roblox.com/docs/reference/engine/classes/AvatarEditorService#SearchCatalog.

assetType.description: The Roblox.Platform.Assets.AssetType serialized if item is an asset.

bundleType.description: The Roblox.Platform.Bundles.Core.BundleType serialized if item is a bundle.

bundledItems.description: The System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1 contained in the bundle, serialized if item is a bundle.

collectibleItemId.description:
The item's collectible item id.
It is an UUID if a item is collectible type. Otherwise, it is null.

creatorHasVerifiedBadge.description: The verified status of a creator.

creatorName.description: The creator name of the item's creator.

creatorTargetId.description: The creator id of the item's creator.

favoriteCount.description: The number of times the item has been favorited.

hasResellers.description: An indicator if the item has resellers or not (null if not resellable).

isOffSale.description: An indicator if the item is off sale or not.

isRecolorable.description: Gets or sets the property whether a bundle is recolorable or not. Not serialized for asset.

itemStatus.description: The System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1 if item has Roblox.Catalog.Api.CatalogItemStatus.

lowestPrice.description: The item's lowest price, only if the item is resellable and there are resellers.

lowestResalePrice.description: The item's lowest resale price, only if the item is resellable and there are resellers, including current user.

offSaleDeadline.description: When the item will go off sale, if the item has an off deadline.

priceStatus.description: The localized string item status if the item's price should not be displayed.

productId.description: The product id of corresponding item.

quantityLimitPerUser.description: Quantity limit for how many instances a user can buy.

saleLocationType.description: The sale location type of the item. ['NotApplicable' = 0, 'ShopOnly' = 1, 'MyExperiencesOnly' = 2, 'ShopAndMyExperiences' = 3, 'ExperiencesById' = 4, 'ShopAndAllExperiences' = 5, 'ExperiencesDevApiOnly' = 6, 'ShopAndExperiencesById' = 7]

supportsHeadShapes.description: Whether the item supports head shapes.

timedOptions.description: The timed options for the item.

totalQuantity.description: The collectible or limited-unique item's total quantity of unique instances.

unitsAvailableForConsumption.description: The number of items in stock, only if the item is resellable and is limitedEdition.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.CatalogSearchDetailed.description: This is the beta (non game-engine) version of our hydration model representing asset or bundle in marketplace.

bundleType.description: The Roblox.Platform.Bundles.Core.BundleType serialized if item is a bundle.

isRecolorable.description: Gets or sets the property whether a bundle is recolorable or not. Not serialized for asset.

lowestPrice.description: The item's lowest price, only if the item is resellable and there are resellers.

lowestResalePrice.description: The item's lowest resale price, only if the item is resellable and there are resellers, including current user.

supportsHeadShapes.description: Whether the item supports head shapes.

taxonomy.description: The taxonomy ids and names for this item.

timedOptions.description: The timed options for the item.

assetTypeIds.description: List of AssetTypeIds corresponding to AssetType enum that this category returns.

bundleTypeIds.description: List of bundleTypeIds corresponding to BundleType enum that this category returns.

isSearchable.description: Gets or sets whether the category is searchable in search bar.

taxonomy.description: The associated public facing web_stable_id corresponding to internal taxonomy uuid for this category.

collectibleItemType.description: The type of collectible item, limited or non-limited for now. ['Invalid' = 0, 'Limited' = 1, 'NonLimited' = 2]

Roblox.Catalog.Api.FavoriteBundlesRespon.description: A response containing favorited bundles and whether there are more.

favorites.description: Collection of favorited bundles and associated details.

moreFavorites.description: True if there exists a next page of favorited bundles.

nextCursor.description: Pagination cursor for the next page.

previousCursor.description: Pagination cursor for the previous page.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.OwnedBundleModel.description: A model to represent owned bundles.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.PremiumPricingModel.description: Defines the Premium pricing for a catalog item.

premiumDiscountPercentage.description: The Premium discount percentage for a catalog item.

premiumPriceInRobux.description: The Premium price for a catalog item.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.SaleLocation.description: SaleLocation information for a collectible item (asset or bundle).

saleLocationType.description: Sale location type related for an item detail. ['NotApplicable' = 0, 'ShopOnly' = 1, 'MyExperiencesOnly' = 2, 'ShopAndMyExperiences' = 3, 'ExperiencesById' = 4, 'ShopAndAllExperiences' = 5, 'ExperiencesDevApiOnly' = 6, 'ShopAndExperiencesById' = 7]

assetTypeIds.description: List of AssetTypeIds corresponding to AssetType enum that this category returns.

bundleTypeIds.description: List of bundleTypeIds corresponding to BundleType enum that this category returns.

taxonomy.description: The taxonomy UUID associated with this node.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.TaxonomyModel.description: public api model coaslescing taxonomy information for a single item.

taxonomyId.description: The id value to pass into taxonomy field in SearchV2 catalog-api.

taxonomyName.description: The localized human readable name of the category.

Roblox.Catalog.Api.TimedOption.description: Defines a timed option for a catalog item.

days.description: The days for the timed option.

price.description: The price for the timed option.

selected.description: To indicate if this option is selected by the client.

originalTopicName.description: The original topic name stored in the table.

maxResult.description: Maximum number of topic results returned from the server.

get.summary: Lists a mapping for assets to category IDs to convert from inventory ID to catalog ID. Creates a mapping to link 'Get More' button in inventory page to the relevant catalog page.
Lists a mapping for assets to subcategory IDs to convert from inventory ID to catalog ID. Creates a mapping to link 'Get More' button in inventory page to the relevant catalog page.

parameters.description: The number of results per request.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: The paging cursor for the previous or next page.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: The order the results are sorted in.
parameters.name: sortOrder

get.summary: Lists the bundles a particular asset belongs to. Use the Id of the last bundle in the response to get the next page.

400.description: 3: Cannot request so many bundles at once.

get.summary: Returns details about the given bundleIds.
Returns details about the given bundleId.

parameters.description: The number of recommended items to return.
parameters.name: numItems

400.description:
1: Invalid bundle
2: Error retrieving bundles
3: Error getting bundle recommendations
4: NumItems exceed maximum

get.summary:
Gets recommendations for a given bundle, bundleId of 0 returns randomized bundles
- Accepts both public and authenticated users.

403.description:
0: Token Validation Failed
7: User is unauthorized.

429.description: 8: The flood limit has been exceeded.
